subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! Upon thee be My peace and My mercy and My loving-kindness. Blessed art thou and thy father who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه علیک سلامی و رحمتی و عنایتی طوبی لک و لابیک الذی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @prayer for protection, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
